context.audience: React developers who prefer progressive enhancement, full-stack developers building data-heavy applications, teams migrating from React Router to the full Remix framework
pain_points: Understanding the React Router v7 and Remix merger and migration path
Nested routing and data loading patterns for complex UIs
Choosing between Remix and Next.js for new projects
Deployment target decisions across Node, Deno, and Cloudflare Workers
Form handling with progressive enhancement and optimistic UI
monetization: SaaS applications with complex data workflows
content_that_works: Data loading and mutation pattern guides
